explanation: Inserted quotes around the password parameter and reordered the command line arguments to test if the rule is sensitive to argument order or formatting.
Substituted long flags with short flags (-server to -s, -vkey to -v, -password to -p) to test if the rule is sensitive to flag syntax variations.
Replaced the short flag -config with its long form --config to test if the rule is sensitive to flag syntax variations.
Used no flags and directly assigned values to parameters, relying on positional parsing if supported by the application to test if the rule is sensitive to flag omission.
Omitted the -config flag and its value to test if the rule is sensitive to optional parameters.
